'''Chessa Dohhenty''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served as [[First Mate/Legends|First Mate]] aboard the [[Bulk freighter/Legends|bulk freighter]] ''[[Colders Watch]]''. She was in a relationship with the vessel's [[Chief engineer/Legends|Chief Engineer]], [[Dirk Harkness]], and was also a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. During a stop at [[Kelada starport]] to [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggle]] [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] to her Alliance contacts, [[General/Legends|General]] [[Halomar Corros]] and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Tony Franco]], she was discovered by a squad of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] and [[Death|killed]] in front of Harkness.<ref name="CD" />

==Behind the scenes==
The unpublished [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 16|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 16]] spells Chessa's last name as "Dohenny."
